name: orch-stubs
description: Performance and scaling stubs owned by Orchestration

scripts.build: (trap 'kill 0' INT; npm run build:auth & npm run build:ipv & npm run build:spot & wait)
scripts.build:auth:clean: rm -rf build/auth & rm -rf build/build.toml && npm run build:auth
scripts.build:ipv:clean: rm -rf build/ipv & rm -rf build/build.toml && npm run build:ipv
scripts.build:spot:clean: rm -rf build/spot & rm -rf build/build.toml && npm run build:spot
scripts.start:local:auth: sam local start-api --template build/auth/template.yaml --env-vars parameters.json -p 3000 --docker-network host --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway
scripts.start:local:ipv: sam local start-api --template build/ipv/template.yaml --env-vars parameters.json -p 3001 --docker-network host --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway
scripts.start:local:spot: sam local start-lambda --template build/spot/template.yaml --env-vars parameters.json -p 3002 --docker-network host --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway
scripts.check: npm run check:lint && npm run check:prettier
scripts.fix: npm run fix:lint && npm run fix:prettier
scripts.test:localstack:integration: npm run localstack:up && (npm run test:integration && e=0) || e=1 && npm run localstack:down && exit $e
scripts.test:ci: tsc --noEmit && npm run localstack:up && (jest --config=./jest.config.ci.ts --runInBand && e=0) || e=1 && npm run localstack:down && exit $e
